title: Senior Product Designer
_verificationNote: Verified live via Greenhouse API (boards-api.greenhouse.io/v1/boards/zocalohealth/jobs/5164755008). Full job description confirmed (rawLength 5229). Published 2026-03-24, updated 2026-03-24. Zócalo Health — tech-enabled primary care for underserved populations, value-based care, culturally competent care delivery. Senior Product Designer founding member of product team. Designs workflow-heavy tools for Community Health Workers, clinicians, care coordinators. $145K–$155K remote USA. 5+ years required. Founded 2021, backed by healthcare/mission-aligned investors. Preferred: experience with Medicaid, bilingual/culturally sensitive UX (Spanish a plus). Reports to VP of Product.
